chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 101 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution 30.01.2026 This matter is pending since 20217 without any progress and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. On 21.12.2023 one week’s time was allowed for compliance. Matter remains in default and today learned counsel remains unrepresented without intimation and / or justification. No case is made out to perpetuate this matter pending without any progress for 8 years. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
